## Meeting Purpose

[Align on user research strategy and educational content initiatives for Bolt AI](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Bolt is in early stages of data collection and analysis to understand user behavior, engagement, and retention](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [GrowthX and Bolt teams are working on aligned initiatives for educational content, templates, and user research](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [User interviews will be conducted to gain deeper insights into high-priority user segments and inform product strategy](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Collaboration on data sharing and analysis will be crucial for targeting the right users and creating effective content](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)

## Topics

### Current State of User Data and Analysis

  - [Recently hired data team, building data warehouse from scratch](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Analyzing prompt data, but information is currently disjointed](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Working on understanding customer journey, activation, engagement, and retention metrics](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Launched in-product user survey last week (50k responses out of 750k MAU)](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [KJ's analysis provides insights on user groups and app types being built](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)

### Educational Content Initiatives

  - [Revamping help center documentation with hired contractor](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [Planning "AI Builder Bootcamp by Bolt" educational website](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [Creating short 3-5 minute video series for beginners](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
  - [Future plans for curated template gallery and community submissions](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)

### GrowthX Initiatives and Alignment

  - [Comparison pages: Bolt vs competitors for specific use cases](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [Starter kits and templates for high-priority user clusters](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [One-shot prompts for various use cases (e.g., CRM dashboard, agency design)](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=1579.0)
  - [User research interviews to uncover deeper insights](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)

### User Segmentation and Prioritization

  - [Focus on three main buckets: internal tools, web design, and mobile](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Need to marry user activity data with LTV and retention data](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [KJ's analysis provides further breakdown of app types within categories](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)

### Key Questions and Metrics to Define

  - [Leading indicators of healthy engagement and retention](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=2301.0)
  - [Identifying optimal activity levels and habits leading to engagement](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=2325.0)
  - [Determining "aha" moment and key drop-off points](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=2338.0)
  - [Defining dormant users and retention metrics](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
  - [Deciding on engagement strategies (e.g., use cases, feature usage, frequency)](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=2422.0)

## Next Steps

  - [George to review KJ's latest CX analysis when shared](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=2501.0)
  - [Combine Miro board data, KJ's analysis, and GrowthX findings to create list of users for interviews](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=2504.0)
  - [Define screening criteria and desired outcomes for user interviews](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=2520.0)
  - [Continue collaboration on data sharing and analysis between teams](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=2500.0)
  - [Align on educational content creation and template development](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=2546.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up to discuss progress and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/cUVscgHysnsPUwvvonPiVe6D7sTxsAgR?tab=summary&timestamp=2586.0)
